name: NephMadness 2026
description: Year 14 of NephMadness — a free online, CME-granting educational initiative on the AJKD Blog modeled on March Madness

regions.name: IgA Nephropathy
regions.blurb: IgAN treatment is being revolutionized by two approaches: targeting B-cells that produce galactose-deficient IgA1, and blocking the complement pathway that drives glomerular inflammation.

regions.name: Artificial Intelligence
regions.blurb: AI in nephrology pits computational pathology (using deep learning to analyze kidney biopsies) against NLP (extracting insights from clinical notes, labs, and literature at scale).

regions.name: Genetics
regions.blurb: Genetic nephrology faces off: conditions that mimic polycystic kidney disease but have different genetic origins vs the evolving landscape of Fabry disease therapies including chaperone and gene therapies.

regions.name: POCUS
regions.blurb: Point-of-care ultrasound gives nephrologists a real-time window into kidney physiology at the bedside — comparing its use in acute kidney injury assessment vs end-stage kidney disease management.

regions.name: Cerebronephrology
regions.blurb: The kidney-brain axis: exploring cognitive decline, stroke risk, and neurological complications in CKD patients vs those on dialysis with ESKD.

regions.name: C3G
regions.blurb: C3 glomerulopathy (C3G) is a rare complement-driven disease. The diagnostic challenge of distinguishing C3GN from dense deposit disease faces off against emerging complement-targeted treatments.

regions.name: Trolls of Transplantation
regions.blurb: Two viral villains that haunt kidney transplant recipients: BK polyomavirus (causing nephropathy and graft loss) vs cytomegalovirus (causing systemic disease and indirect graft effects).

regions.name: Animal House
regions.blurb: Veterinary nephrology meets human medicine: dogs as glomerular disease models with dialysis parallels, vs cats as CKD champions with 80% geriatric prevalence and successful kidney transplants.

phase1_regions.description: Days 1-8: One region per working day, introducing both teams

phase2_matchups.description: Days 9-16: Deep-dive matchup analysis, one region per day
